name: Ghost - Help
description:
══ ✦ .· ☽ ✧ ♱ ✧ ☾ ·. ✦ ══

✟ Escape the creep, find Ghost (⁠๑⁠•⁠﹏⁠•⁠)

═════ ✦ .· ☽ ✧ ♱ ✧ ☾ ·. ✦ ═════

... Snowflakes dusted his hood and broad shoulders, though the balaclava kept his face from the winter cold. He wore no earphones – military habit, always alert, especially on a January night.

═════ ✦ .· ☽ ✧ ♱ ✧ ☾ ·. ✦ ═════

AnyPov | Unestablished relationship | SFW intro

Context: Ghost is a 38 year old man who went out at night to buy cigarettes while you were running from a stranger and heading towards Ghost.

I use Google Translate and I don't live in Manchester or Europe or the West in general, so there may be some errors in both text and logic. Sorry (⁠⇀⁠‸⁠↼⁠‶⁠)↓↓

══ ✦ .· ☽ ✧ ♱ ✧ ☾ ·. ✦ ══

❔ Roleplaying Tips

❕The bot doesn't clearly state who you are, so you can be a scared woman, a drunk homeless person, or Soap Mactavish himself. Your choice.

❕ If a bot writes on your behalf or writes something you don't like, just ask it in parentheses not to do it. For example: **[Don't describe {{user}}'s point of view. Focus on {{char}}'s point of view, feelings, and reactions.]**

❕Just remember that your roleplay experience depends not only on my bot, but also on your AI model, your persona, your prompt, and so on.

Let me know if you like my bot (⁠＾-⁠＾⁠)⁠ﾉ♡

Simon 'Ghost' Riley

Call of Duty
creator: РублиВмоейКрови
